newChat.title: New conversation
newChat.hint: To start cold outreach, WhatsApp requires an approved template.
newChat.name: Name (optional)

media.title: Send file
media.hint: Attach an image, document, audio, or video from your device.
media.caption: Caption (optional)

sim.title: Simulate incoming message
sim.hint: Inject a message as if it arrived from WhatsApp (for testing).
sim.name: Name (optional)

templateCreate.title: Create template
templateCreate.intro: After creation, Meta reviews it (minutes to hours). If you use variables ({{1}}, {{2}}…), define API keys and examples — Meta requires them when creating the template.
templateCreate.name: Name (no spaces)
templateCreate.varsHint: Only if you use {{1}}, {{2}}… in the body. Key = API name; example = value Meta reviews for approval. Use the variable library in Templates as reference.
templateCreate.header: Header (optional, max 60 · only one {{1}} if it has a variable)
